Tasting Notes: Concentrated Smaragd from elevated Kreutles parcels showing pronounced lees influence and citric precision. Tightly wound core of citrus pith and zest.
Benchmark Wachau Riesling with laser-focused acidity and extraordinary mineral tension. Notes of white peach, lime zest, and crushed stone.
Elegant and precise with hallmark Achleithen character. Citrus, apricot, and subtle spice notes with incredible length.
Volcanic character meets Nerello elegance. Red cherry, dried herbs, and ash-tinged minerality with fine tannins.
Quintessential Nahe Riesling with perfect balance of sweetness and acidity. Stone fruit, citrus, and slate minerality.
